channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Yamamoto outduels Darvish in historic matchup as Dodgers beat Padres 2-0 to reach NLCS
item.description: Yoshinobu Yamamoto outdueled Yu Darvish in a historic playoff matchup of Japanese-born starters, and the Los Angeles Dodgers got home runs from Kiké Hernández and Teoscar Hernández to beat the San Diego Padres 2-0 and advance to the National League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Beth Harris, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Stephan Jaeger chips in twice and shoots 63 to lead Black Desert Championship
item.description: IVINS, Utah (AP) — Stephan Jaeger made up for a three-putt from 10 feet by chipping in for birdie on consecutive holes Friday for an 8-under 63 that gave him a one-shot lead before the second round was suspended by darkness at the inaugural Black Desert Championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: MLB spring training facilities spared extensive damage from Hurricane Milton
item.description: Major League Baseball spring training facilities on Florida’s west coast appear to have been mostly spared major damage during Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: Fred Goodall, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: How to cheer on the Padres for NLDS Game 5
item.description: Fans are still cheering on the San Diego Padres as they take on the Los Angeles Dodgers in Game 5 of the National League Division Series Friday evening, following Wednesday's 8-0 blowout.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall will return to practice for the 1st time since he was shot
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall is set to return to practice next week for the first time since he was shot in the chest in a robbery attempt nine days before the season opener.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Bay Area high school football league addresses viral “BTA” TikTok trend causing fights across nation
item.description: The Oakland Athletic League takes proactive measures to prevent postgame brawls caused by viral social media trend.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Texas Dem Allred says he opposes 'boys in girls' sports' despite past of allowing it, fighting parental rights
item.description: Texas congressional representative Colin Allred released a campaign ad on Friday in which he stated he “doesn't want boys playing girls' sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sharks’ Celebrini doesn’t practice, status for Saturday’s game in question
item.description: San Jose Sharks coach Ryan Warsofsky said Macklin Celebrini had a lower-body ailment and was being evaluated.
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Drake Maye's girlfriend 'so excited' about rookie's first NFL start
item.description: New England Patriots rookie quarterback Drake Maye will make his first NFL start Sunday, and his girlfriend could not contain her excitement.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Todd Downing tasked with helping Aaron Rodgers and Jets' struggling offense after 'unique week'
item.description: FLORHAM PARK, N.J. (AP) — Aaron Rodgers and the New York Jets' offense appeared on their way toward the efficient, high-scoring and productive force they fully expected they'd be this season. A lot has certainly changed in the last three weeks.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Giants WR Malik Nabers to miss 2nd straight game with a concussion
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — Wide receiver Malik Nabers, the NFL's leader with 35 catches, remains in the concussion protocol and will miss his second consecutive game, Giants coach Brian Daboll announced before practice Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Oklahoma and Texas, one of college football's most storied rivalries, opens new chapter in the SEC
item.description: NORMAN, Okla. (AP) — Perhaps the only way the Oklahoma-Texas rivalry could have become even more intense happened when both joined the powerful Southeastern Conference in July. The series that began in 1900 immediately will rank with the best of the SEC’s older ones -- Alabama vs.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Minnesota Lynx stun New York Liberty with 95-93 overtime win in Game 1 of the WNBA Finals
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Minnesota coach Cheryl Reeve has seen a lot in her incredible career that's included four WNBA championships. The historic rally by the Lynx to beat New York 95-93 in a wild Game 1 of the WNBA Finals ranks right up there as one of the best moments.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Travis Kelce’s ex says she receives hateful comments from Taylor Swift fans on social media
item.description: Travis Kelce's ex, Kayla Nicole, said she receives hateful comments from Taylor Swift's fan's during a recent appearance on "Unapologetically Angel.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL officials' missed call during 49ers-Seahawks game bewilders fans
item.description: NFL officials puzzled fans and players alike on Thursday night over a missed call during a game between the Seattle Seahawks and San Francisco 49ers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gerrit Cole tosses playoff gem, shutting down Royals and sending Yankees back to ALCS with 3-1 win
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Gerrit Cole pitched like a postseason ace Thursday night, holding the Kansas City Royals to a single run over seven innings and sending the New York Yankees to a 3-1 victory that put them back in the American League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: PHOTOS: A recap of Padres Game 3 victory over Dodgers
item.description: Tuesday marked another victory for the San Diego Padres, with the home team beating the Los Angeles Dodgers 6-5 in Game 3 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Tropicana demolition in Las Vegas makes way for A's stadium
item.description: (KRON) -- Tropicana Las Vegas was demolished early Wednesday morning, making way for a proposed baseball stadium for the Athletics. The Tropicana implosion happened at around 2:30 a.m. on the Las Vegas strip, with the A’s logo lighting up the sky as both hotel towers came down.
item.dc:creator: Michael Thomas, KRON4

item.title: Blackhawks' rally falls short in season-opening 5-2 loss in Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — The Utah Hockey Club got off to a great start in its new hometown Tuesday night. The Blackhawks' start, meanwhile, was less than ideal. Utah never trailed in a season opener, building a 3-0 lead before holding off a Chicago rally for a 5-2 victory.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Whittingham not ready to hand keys over to Wilson yet
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With so much uncertainty as to when Cam Rising will be able to return at quarterback for the Utah football team, is there a point when head coach Kyle Whittingham will move on from Rising and hand the keys to the offense over to freshman Isaac Wilson? "There is
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC players understand significance of first NHL game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - No matter what happens this season, there will never be another first NHL game for the Utah Hockey Club It's just game 1 of 82, but the Utah HC players know how historic tonight's game against the Chicago Blackhawks at the Delta Center will be.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Padres return to Petco Park in NLDS: What to know before you go
item.description: San Diego Padres fans are ecstatic to welcome back their team to Petco Park for games three and four of the National League Division Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: 8 Real Salt Lake players and staff nominated for MLS end-of-season awards
item.description: Real Salt Lake head coach Pablo Mastroeni and seven players have been named to the shortlist of nominees for Major League Soccer's end-of-season awards, highlighting the Utah club's standout 2024 season.
item.dc:creator: Carson Lantz, ABC 4

item.title: Another state regulator targets Brewers owner over alleged sand theft in Malibu
item.description: A second state agency is targeting the owner of the Milwaukee Brewers for taking sand from a Malibu beach.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Castellanos wins Game 2 for Phillies with 9th-inning single, top Mets 7-6
item.description: Castellanos, who led the major leagues this season with four walk-off hits, tossed his helmet and was mobbed by teammates on the infield as a game that seemed to slip away one inning earlier turned into one more comeback for the NL East champions.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: PHOTOS: Padres look to rebound in game 2 of NLDS against Dodgers
item.description: Photos: The San Diego Padres are facing off against the Los Angeles Dodgers in Game 2 of the NL Division Series on Sunday, with Yu Darvish starting for the Padres.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Stenhouse snaps 65-race losing streak after late crash at Talladega scrambles playoff picture
item.description: Ricky Stenhouse Jr. snapped a 65-race losing streak by winning in overtime at Talladega on Sunday after a late crash collected more than half the field.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Caleb Williams, Bears offense overwhelm Panthers, advance to 3-2
item.description: CHICAGO — Caleb Williams continued his improvement with a breakout game Sunday against the Carolina Panthers, as the Chicago Bears used a first-half offensive blitz to cruise to an easy victory Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Real Salt Lake clinches home playoff game with 1-0 victory
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake will be home for the playoffs, at least in the first round. RSL (15-7-11) extended its five-game unbeaten run with a 1-0 win away at San Jose, as Zac MacMath recorded his second straight clean sheet in goal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NASCAR playoffs roll into Talladega as cloud of lawsuit hangs over sport
item.description: It's most fitting that NASCAR this weekend races at Talladega Superspeedway, the sight of one of the first major disputes between drivers and the top stock car series in the United States.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: The Big Sho: Ohtani hits tying 3-run homer in playoff debut for the Los Angeles Dodgers in NLDS win
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani rewrote the record book during his first season with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Now, he's getting a chance to make more history in his highly anticipated playoff debut.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Washington pulls away in 4th quarter to beat No. 10 Michigan 27-17 in title game rematch
item.description: Washington quarterback Will Rogers watched the final seconds tick away and wondered if the field at Husky Stadium was about to be flooded with purple.
item.dc:creator: TIM BOOTH, Associated Press, Fox 5
